00030 #ifndef _LAMEBUS_LTIMER_H_
00031 #define _LAMEBUS_LTIMER_H_
00032 
00033 /*
00034  * Hardware device data for LAMEbus timer device
00035  */
00036 struct ltimer_softc {
00037         /* Initialized by config function */
00038         int lt_hardclock;        /* true if we should call hardclock() */
00039         int lt_timerclock;        /* true if we should call timerclock() */
00040 
00041         /* Initialized by lower-level attach routine */
00042         void *lt_bus;           /* bus we're on */
00043         uint32_t lt_buspos;     /* position (slot) on that bus */
00044         
00045 };
00046 
00047 /* Functions called by lower-level drivers */
00048 void ltimer_irq(/*struct ltimer_softc*/ void *lt);  // interrupt handler
00049 
00050 /* Functions called by higher-level devices */
00051 void ltimer_beep(/*struct ltimer_softc*/ void *devdata);   // for beep device
00052 void ltimer_gettime(/*struct ltimer_softc*/ void *devdata,
00053                     time_t *secs, uint32_t *nsecs);       // for rtclock
00054 
00055 #endif /* _LAMEBUS_LTIMER_H_ */
